description: Create an MQTT connector and verify (covers `neomind connector create` write path; previously only list was covered).

turns.user: Add an external MQTT broker: name factory-broker, host 192.168.1.100, port 1883, subscribing to topics 'sensor/#,device/#'. After creating, list connectors to confirm.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind connector create --type mqtt --name factory-broker --host 192.168.1.100 --port 1883 --topics 'sensor/#,device/#'` (flag order varies, --type defaults to mqtt so may be omitted), then calls `neomind connector list` to verify
expectations.overall: Must actually execute create + list, not just restate in reply
